rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) is unrelated to Gov't Code §2306.120, which governs bond depository selection for the housing finance division. No overlap or conflict exists.
quote: Sec. 2306.120. SELECTION OF DEPOSITORY UNDER COVENANTS OF BONDS OR TRUST INDENTURES.
_note: No conflict; the rule_text concerns bond depository covenants and has no bearing on property tax homestead exemptions.
